Class InventoryController

java.lang.Object
scenes.inventory.InventoryController
public class InventoryController extends Object
Controller for the inventory overlay scene. Manages pagination of the player's item list and delegates equip/use actions to the underlying Player.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    ITEMS_PER_PAGE
    Number of items shown on a single inventory page.

  • Field Details

    • ITEMS_PER_PAGE

      public static final int ITEMS_PER_PAGE
      Number of items shown on a single inventory page.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • InventoryController

      public InventoryController(Player player)
      Creates a new InventoryController for the given player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose inventory will be managed

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentPage

      public int getCurrentPage()
      Returns the zero-based index of the currently displayed page.
      Returns:
      the current page index

    • getPlayer

      public Player getPlayer()
      Returns the player associated with this inventory session.
      Returns:
      the player

    • getTotalPages

      public int getTotalPages()
      Returns the total number of pages needed to display the player's inventory. Always returns at least 1 even when the inventory is empty.
      Returns:
      the total page count

    • nextPage

      public void nextPage()
      Advances to the next page if one exists.

    • prevPage

      public void prevPage()
      Goes back to the previous page if one exists.

    • getPageItems

      public List<ItemCounter> getPageItems()
      Returns the slice of the inventory items that belong to the current page.
      Returns:
      a sub-list of ItemCounters for the current page

    • clampPage

      public void clampPage()
      Ensures currentPage stays within the valid range [0, totalPages-1].

    • equipWeapon

      public void equipWeapon(BaseWeapon weapon)
      Equips the given weapon on the player.
      Parameters:
      weapon - the weapon to equip

    • equipArmor

      public void equipArmor(BaseArmor armor)
      Equips the given armor on the player.
      Parameters:
      armor - the armor to equip

    • unequipWeapon

      public void unequipWeapon()
      Unequips the player's currently equipped weapon, if any.

    • unequipArmor

      public void unequipArmor()
      Unequips the player's currently equipped armor, if any.

    • usePotion

      public void usePotion(ItemCounter counter)
      Consumes the potion in the given counter, applying its effect to the player. Decrements the stack count and removes the entry from the inventory when the count reaches zero.
      Parameters:
      counter - the inventory entry holding the potion to use

    • buildStatSuffix

      public String buildStatSuffix(BaseItem item)
      Builds a short display suffix showing the item's stat bonus or equipped status. Returns " ✅" if the item is currently equipped, or " (+atk N)" / " (+def N)" for unequipped weapons/armors. Returns an empty string for all other item types.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to build a suffix for
      Returns:
      the stat suffix string

    • isWeaponEquipped

      public boolean isWeaponEquipped(BaseWeapon weapon)
      Returns whether the given weapon is currently equipped by the player.
      Parameters:
      weapon - the weapon to check
      Returns:
      true if the weapon is equipped

    • isArmorEquipped

      public boolean isArmorEquipped(BaseArmor armor)
      Returns whether the given armor is currently equipped by the player.
      Parameters:
      armor - the armor to check
      Returns:
      true if the armor is equipped
